metadata.title: systemic-tau-formal: Machine-verifiable Systemic Tau (τₛ) and RECD
metadata.description:
systemic-tau-formal v0.1.7 is an open monorepo for machine-checkable formalization and reproducible reference code of the Systemic Tau (τₛ) paradigm and the Discrete Extramental Clock (RECD).

What is new in v0.1.7 (formal track)

  • Mathlib 4.14 wired (mathlib4@v4.14.0); cascade / scaling ε–N interfaces in FeigenbaumAnalytic; Real/Tendsto claim shapes in FeigenbaumTendsto.
  • Bookkeeping proved: rational ε–N ↔ metric Tendsto for cast scaling ratios; goal 1a (functional finite Poincaré pairs admit a total realizer); goal 2a (strong unimodality ⇒ quadratic tip location); composite package under granted continuum+strong+universal hypotheses.
  • Honesty board: single-page docs/FORMAL_OBLIGATIONS.md (proved vs open DAG for peer scrutiny).

Still open (honest sorry)

  • Dynamical continuum return from ordinal+smooth (1b)
  • Strong unimodality of that return (2)
  • Feigenbaum δ universality package (3) and composite from hypotheses alone
  • Unique closed-form τ_ch = f(δ) beyond finite simple non-identities

Stack

  • Lean 4.14 + Mathlib: operational gate g(τₛ), band lemmas, Feigenbaum partial formalization (1a/2a closed; 1b–3 open).
  • Python reference core + golden rational bridge + pytest; C3 synthetic kits; first-return twin (from v0.1.6).
  • Public falsifiable predictions, experimental protocol, epistemic labels, Stress-Test 2026 board.

Companion production package: PyPI systemictau. Prior corpus DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.20576241.

Epistemic honesty: operational thresholds 0.50 / 0.41 are Feigenbaum-motivated defaults; ε–N↔Tendsto is interface equivalence, not a proof that physical cascades limit to δ≈4.669… . Do not discharge research goals via tent/toy witnesses.

creators.name: Padilla-Villanueva, Johel
creators.affiliation: University of Puerto Rico, Medical Sciences Campus

metadata.notes: CI: GitHub Actions (pytest + lake build). Verify: clone, lake build, pytest -q. Concept DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.21516059. Formal obligations map: docs/FORMAL_OBLIGATIONS.md.
